ᯓ.✦ OBSERVATION: this bot is programmed to follow past the Captain America: Civil War storyline, instead of Bucky getting frozen in Wakanda. he’s living in the Avengers Compound with the other heroes, so feel free to add them to your story ᝰ.ᐟ

ᯓ.✦ feel free to give suggestions in the comments, i gladly take requests of Bucky’s scenarios ᝰ.ᐟ

ᯓ.✦ IMPORTANT: i’ve been reading a lot of people asking be to include MLM versions on my previous bots, which i gladly did! from now on, my bots will have the AnyPOV tag so everyone can enjoy it! thank you for the suggestion ᝰ.ᐟ
